notes: Phase-1 proof task (per bench/testing-suite-plan.md). The oracle (verify.mjs) implements the project-blueprint verification step: a PRIMARY suite (stated behaviors) + a HELD-OUT suite (altered params the agent never saw, killing hardcoded returns) + an ANTI-CHEAT diff (DQ if corpus.json is altered). solution/server.mjs scores 1.0; validate.mjs proves the oracle catches off-by-one, hardcoded/overfit, missing-tool, crash, and tamper. Telemetry per blueprint: oracle score, tokens, cost, wall-clock, and num_turns (the iteration/loop-count metric).
